Zhu Fang Êú±Ëä≥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Fang (Êú±Ëä≥). General of Wang Jing, one of four sent to attack Jiang Wei, they are defeated. Zhu Fang may not have existed in history. Zhu Fang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
